description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6.2.0 Docker image. Set a global before_script that runs `npm install --global gulp jspm`, then `npm install`, then `jspm install -y`. Cache the directories `node_modules/` and `jspm_modules/`. Define a job named generate in the default test stage that executes the shell command `gulp test`. No services, artifacts, or conditional rules are required.
